title: Method and system for distributing time and frequency references from a primary station to a plurality of secondary stations
abstract: A method and a system are described for synchronizing one or more secondary stations (M13 1,2,...,n ) to a Primary Station (M14), wherein the Primary Station (M14) transmits television programs (payload) sending them continuously in the form of signal packets (BB 1,2,...,n ), subsequently identified through their corresponding CRC32 1,2,...,n , to a satellite (M1) which retransmits them towards the ground stations, in which the Primary Station (M14) includes first means suitable for generating Info packets (M2 1,2,...,n ), containing information for subsequent synchronization, and to send them to one or more Secondary Stations (M13 1,2,...,n ); the Secondary Stations (M13 1,2,â¦ n ) comprise second means suitable for receiving the Info packets (M2 1,2,â¦,n ) and for carrying out the synchronization.
claims:
Claims 1. System for synchronizing to a Primary Station (M14) one or more secondary Stations (M13 1,2, . . . ,n ) , in which said Primary Station (M14) transmits television programs (payload) by sending them continuously under form of signal packets (BBi, 2 ,...,n) , subsequently identified through their corresponding CRC32I, 2 , ... to a satellite (Ml) which retransmits them towards the ground stations, or said Primary Station (M14) and one or more Secondary Stations (M13 1,2, . . . ,n ) , wherein: - said Primary Station (M14) comprises first means able to generate Info packets (M2 1,2, . . . ,n ) , containing the information for the subsequent synchronization, and to send them to one or more Secondary Stations (M13 1,2, . . . ,n ) ; said Secondary Stations (M13 1,2, . . . ,n ) comprise second means adapted to receive said Info packets (M2 1,2, . . . ,n ) and to carry out the synchronization by means of a Time Shift and a Frequency Correction of Secondary References (Mlli, 2 ,...,n) of said Secondary Stations (M13 1,2, . . . ,n ) characterized in that said second means adapted to receive said Info packets (M2 1,2, . . . ,n ) and to carry out the synchronization of said Secondary 

Stations (M13 1,2, . . . ,n ) comprise: - a Demodulator (M8) suitable for demodulating the Main Data Flow with Info (M9) received from the Satellite (Ml ) ; a Secondary Packet Processor (M15) , able to calculate the CRC32 1,2, . . . ,n of the packets of the Flow (M9) and to detect the instant (AT1 1,2, . . . ,n ) of arrival of the packets of said Flow (M9) , said arrival instant being detected with respect to a Secondary Reference (Mil) which includes a Secondary Counter (P15) and a Secondary Reference Oscillator (P16) capable of generating a Secondary Time Reference (P17) and Frequency (P18) ; - a Memory (Wl) , suitable for storing the values CRC32 1,2 , ... , n of the packets (BB 1,2 , ... , n ) of the Flow (M9) and the instant of arrival (AT1 1,2, . . . ,n ) of each of them. 2. System for synchronizing to a Primary Station (M14) of one or more secondary Stations (M13 1,2, . . . ,n ) according to claim 1, characterized in that said first means suitable for generating Info packets (M2 1,2, . . . ,n ) , containing the information for synchronization, and to send them to one or more Secondary Stations (M13 1,2, . . . ,n ) include: - a Multiplexer (M20) suitable for inserting Info 

packets (M2 1,2, . . . ,n ) in a Main Data Flow (M6) , generating a Main Data Flow with Info (M9) ; a DVB-S/S2 Modulator (x) (M3) , suitable for carrying out the transmission of said Main Data Flow with Info (M9) sending it continuously to the Satellite (Ml ) ; - a Primary Reference (M4) , comprising a Primary Counter (PIO) and a Primary Reference Oscillator (Pll) suitable for generating a Primary Time Reference (P12) and a Frequency Reference (P13) ; a Primary Packet Processor (M5) , capable of generating said Info Packets (M2 1,2, . . . ,n ) on the basis of the arrival times (MO1 1 , 2 , ... , n ) at the Primary Station (M14) of said packets (BBi ;2 ,..., n ) and related CRC32 1,2, . . . ,n calculated on any temporally equidistant packets (BB (n) ) ; a DVB-S/S2 (x) demodulator (M7) , suitable for receiving said Main Data Flow with Info (M9) , transmitted by the Satellite (Ml) and for demodulating it. 3. Method for synchronizing to a Primary Station (M14) of one or more Secondary Stations (M13 1,2, . . . ,n ) , wherein said Primary Station (M14) transmits television programs (payload) by sending them continuously under form of signal packets 

(BBi |2 ,...,n) , identifiable through their corresponding CRC32 1,2, . . . ,n , to a Geostationary Satellite (Ml) which retransmits them towards the ground stations, or called Primary Station (M14) and one or more Secondary Stations (M13 1,2, . . . ,n ) , composing Info packets (M2i, 2; ..., n ) containing all information necessary for synchronization and sending them to the Secondary Stations (M13 1,2, . . . ,n ) , wherein said Info packets (M2i, 2; ..., n ) are sent regularly to the Secondary Stations (M13 1,2, . . . ,n ) , characterized in that the method comprises the following steps: the Primary Station (M14) receives, through a Demodulator (M7) , said Main Data Flow (M9) comprising said Signal Packets (BB 1,2 , ... , n ) transmitted by the Satellite (Ml) and, through a Packet Processor Primary (M5) , occasionally and periodically records, on the basis of its Primary Reference (M4) , the instant (MOI) in which it receives any of said Data Packets (BB (n) ) , of which it calculates the CRC32 (n) ; - the same Primary Packet Processor (M5) composes its own Info packet (M2 (n) ) which contains the following data: the just calculated CRC32 (n) of the received 

packet (BB (n) ) ; the instant of receipt (MO1 (n) ) of the packet (BB( n )) of which the CRC32 (n) referred to the Primary Reference (M4) was calculated; - the Primary Station (M14) sends said Info packet (M2 (n) ) to the Secondary Stations (M13i, 2 ,...,n) ; - said one or more Secondary Stations (M13 1 , 2 , ... , n ) store in a memory (Wl) : the reception instants, or time positions, (ATli, 2 ,..., n ) of all received packets (BB 1 , 2 , ... , n ) , said time positions (AT1 1,2; ... ,n ) being referred to the Secondary References (Mil) ; - the related CRC32 1 , 2 ,..., n , calculated on site by a Secondary Packet Processor (M15) ; whenever the Secondary Packet Processor (M15) receives an Info packet (M2 ( n ) ) , it scans backwards the memory (Wl) in order to find an element with the same CRC32 (n) contained in the Info packet (M2 (n) ) , found the element extracts the associated temporal information (ATl (n) ) ; - the Secondary Stations (M13 1 , 2 , ... , n ) use the time position (AT1 (n) ) of the packet received with the same CRC32 (n) of the one contained in the Info packet (M2 (n) ) , to calculate the time difference between the two instants, i.e. the time error 

between the Primary Reference (M4) and the Secondary Reference (Mil) , less than a time difference (CGI) in the path between the Primary Station (M14) and the Satellite (Ml) and the Secondary Station (M13 1,2, . . . ,n ) and the Satellite (Ml) itself . 4. Method according to claim 3, characterized in that said Info packets (M2I, 2 , ... , n ) are sent to the Secondary Stations (M13 1;2 ,..., n ) by inserting them into the Main Data Flow (M6) by means of a Multiplexer (M20) , thus constituting a Main Data Flow with Info (M9) . 5. Method according to claim 3, characterized in that said Info packets (M2 1 , 2 ,..., n ) are sent to the Secondary Stations (M13 1,2, . . . ,n ) via a telephone line, or a radiomodem, or the Internet. 6. Method according to claim 3, characterized in that information contained in the Info packet (M2) are used to perform the synchronization by means of a Time Shift of the Secondary References (Mil) of the Secondary Stations (M13 1,2, . . . ,n .) 7. Method according to claim 3, characterized in that the information contained in the Info packet (M2) is used to perform the synchronization by means of a Frequency Correction (P21) of the 

Secondary References (Mil) of the Secondary Stations (M13 1,2, . . . ,n ). 8. Method according to claim 7, characterized in that : - said Info packet (M2 (n) ) further contains the geographical position data of the Primary Station (M14) and of the Satellite (Ml) ; - said one or more Secondary Stations (M13 1,2, . . . ,n ) use said geographical position data of the Primary Station (M14) and of the Satellite (Ml) to calculate said time difference (CGI) to correct the error of its own Reference Secondary (Mil) . 9. Method according to at least one of claims 3 to 8, characterized in that the Frequency Correction (P21) of the Secondary References (Mil) of the Secondary Stations (M13 1,2, . . . ,n ) is carried out by increasing this frequency, if it is necessary to anticipate the Time Reference (P17) , or by decreasing it in the opposite case.
